nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { flowId (required), input_value (required), input_type (optional), output_type (optional), components (optional), stream (optional) }. API key via X-API-Key header only. Set LANGFLOW_API_KEY env var to enable authentication.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.comment: Validates: API key auth (header only - X-API-Key), flowId (required), input_value (required), input_type, output_type, components, stream, channel name
nodes.notes: Validates: flowId (required, max 100 chars), input_value (required, max 32768 chars), input_type (chat|text|document), output_type (chat|text|debug), components (optional object), stream (boolean), channel (alphanumeric, dash, underscore)

nodes.name: Langflow API Call
nodes.comment: Calls Langflow /api/v1/run/{flowId} endpoint. 5 min timeout for complex workflows.

nodes.name: Process Response
nodes.comment: Extracts answer from Langflow format, handles various response structures, latency, and flowId.

nodes.name: Discord Output
nodes.comment: Sends response to Discord webhook. Truncates answer to 1750 chars to stay under Discord's 2000 char limit.

parameters.text:
={{ '*Langflow Failed* ❌

**Error:** ' + (($input.all()[0]?.error?.message || $input.all()[0]?.error?.description || 'Unknown error')).toString().slice(0, 997).trimEnd() + '

Please check:
- Langflow service is running
- flowId is valid
- API key is correct
- Flow is deployed' }}

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Sends error notification from Validate Input or API call failures.
